Item Details:

## sidebar-13

A sidebar in a dialog.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 2 file(s)

visual_summary: A reusable, collapsible sidebar component suitable for use within a dialog, providing an organized layout for additional features or options. This component is particularly useful when presenting detailed information or providing additional actions in a controlled manner. It can be easily hidden or shown when needed, streamlining the user interface.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready sidebar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-13
Description: A reusable, collapsible sidebar component suitable for use within a dialog, providing an organized layout for additional features or options. This component is particularly useful when presenting detailed information or providing additional actions in a controlled manner. It can be easily hidden or shown when needed, streamlining the user interface.
Style: e.g. modern, flat, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. collapsible, responsive, on-click
Tags: sidebar, dialog, collapsible, options, navigation, control

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
